steps.name: plan
steps.input_summary: User asks how to reset MFA on their corporate account after phone replacement
steps.output_summary: Plan: search internal docs for MFA reset procedure, then compose step-by-step instructions

steps.name: search_docs
steps.input_summary: Query: MFA reset procedure corporate account
steps.output_summary: Found doc: KB-2041 MFA Reset Guide. Covers admin-initiated reset and self-service with backup codes.

steps.name: reason
steps.input_summary: Synthesize KB-2041 into user-facing instructions for MFA reset after device change
steps.output_summary: Drafted 4-step reply: navigate to security settings, select reset MFA, verify via backup email, re-enroll new device

steps.name: verify
steps.input_summary: Check agent reply against KB-2041 ground truth and user question
steps.output_summary: All 4 steps match KB article. No hallucinated information. Tone is appropriate.

result.label: pass
result.summary: Correctly retrieved MFA reset procedure and produced accurate step-by-step instructions
